operationalProblem: تحتاج الإدارة إلى صلاحيات دقيقة مرتبطة بالعملية والسطح، وإلى فصل منشئ القرار عن معتمده ومستفيده، مع سجل تدقيق غير قابل للتعديل وتراجع محكوم لا يحذف التاريخ ولا ينقل حقيقة الهوية أو القوى العاملة إلى DSH.
targetOutcome: إدارة أدوار وإسنادات قابلة للتدقيق والتراجع تمر طفراتها الحساسة عبر Maker-Checker، وتعرض تشخيصات منقحة، وتفتح من سطح الإدارة مسارات التفعيل والحظر واعتماد الكابتن لدى مالكي الحقيقة السياديين بدل إنشاء طفرات موازية.
negativeInvariants: Every role definition, assignment, revocation, and rollback request has a reason and an optimistic version.
Maker, beneficiary, and checker are distinct for role assignments; rollback checker is also distinct from the original decision checker.
A rollback appends an inverse decision and never deletes the source approval or its audit trail.
The administration audit table is append-only outside an explicit maintenance context and readback redacts non-allowlisted details.
Administration diagnostics expose aggregate counts only and never return phone numbers, credentials, documents, session tokens, or secrets.
Identity authenticates the actor, but a broad role label never authorizes an administration operation; exact control-panel permission or an approved active DSH role projection is required.
Role-definition, role-assignment, and rollback queues are readable only by their corresponding checker permissions.
Partner review notes and captain license numbers remain inside their sovereign owners and are absent from administration projections.
Partner activation and captain credential mutations remain owned by their lifecycle and Workforce accreditation owners; administration only delegates navigation to those live owner surfaces.
acceptanceCriteria: Role definitions persist normalized operation permissions and explicit surface scope with control-panel mandatory.
Role definition and staff role changes use maker-checker approval with version conflict protection.
Approved assignment or revocation decisions can be reversed only through a separate independently approved inverse request.
Audit writes avoid raw reason or review-note values, audit readback is redacted, and update or delete is rejected by the database trigger.
Approval queues require role, staff, or rollback checker permissions and cannot be listed through administration.read alone.
The administration permission gate has no broad operator-role bypass and does not propagate phone PII.
Partner and captain administration projections omit partner review notes and captain license numbers.
The control-panel shared administration brain binds roles, approvals, rollback, diagnostics, and audit to live DSH routes.
The partner projection opens the governed partner lifecycle detail for activation or blocking and the captain projection opens Workforce for creation, update, documents, and license review.
Targeted Go tests, TypeScript checks, route binding checks, contract checks, and migration checks pass on one immutable branch commit.
